items.headline: Malayalam actor accused of hit-and-run outside Trivandrum club; 2 bikers injured
whyItMatters: A car, reportedly driven by actor Maniyanpilla Raju, allegedly struck a motorcycle and fled the scene after exiting the Trivandrum Club late Thursday. Two individuals on the two-wheeler sustained inju
summaryParagraphs: A car, reportedly driven by actor Maniyanpilla Raju, allegedly struck a motorcycle and fled the scene after exiting the Trivandrum Club late Thursday. Two individuals on the two-wheeler sustained injuries and were hospitalized. The actor has reportedly pledged to cooperate with investigators and appear on Friday morning. For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.
